zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn於1451年出生時，她的父親Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court26歲，母親Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn52歲。她於大約1469年與Sir Rys ap Thomas在威爾士卡馬特史爾卡素 格林 卡馬特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1545年11月9日在英國威爾斯享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn于1451年出生时，她的父亲Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court26岁，母亲Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn52岁。她于大约1469年与Sir Rys ap Thomas在威尔士卡馬特史爾卡素 格林 卡馬特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1545年11月9日在英国威尔斯享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: sw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Ming, Hong, Jing, Bin, Yi, Yuan, Chan, Chao, Chen, Hua, Hui, Qi, Min, Tam, Ti, Chang, Hyun Ho, Hyun Sun, Jang, Jeong, Jung Ho, Kwang Soo.  Vietnamese Thanh, Hoa, Hung, Nam, Lan, Minh, Nu, Phong, Quang, Tuan, Anh, Binh, Buu, Chau.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 蘇, the Chinese name for perilla (a herb of the mint family); also meaning ‘revive’ in Chinese: (i) from Su (蘇), the name of an ancient state (originally located in Henan province, then moved to Hebei province) during the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ) and the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). During the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), the state of Su (蘇) was granted to Su Fen Sheng (蘇忿生), a revered official who made great contributions to the establishment of the Western Zhou dynasty. After the state was annexed by minority ethnic groups in northern China during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ba Lue (拔略) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to the Wu Huan ethnic group and the Di ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 㝛, meaning ‘lodge for the night’ in Chinese: (i) from Su (㝛), the name of an ancient state (located in Dongping in Shandong province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Su Liu Jin (㝛六斤) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

variants.name: Shu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Xin, Chi Ming, Chi-Man, Li Li, Li Min, Wei, Yee, Yonghui, Baolin, Bin, Chi, Chih-Cheng.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 舒, meaning ‘stretch, unfold’ or ‘leisurely’ in Chinese: from Shu (舒), the name of an ancient state (located in Anhui province) during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ). The state was once annexed by the state of Xu in 657  BC  but later restored. Later, it was eventually annexed by the state of Chu in 552  BC , and the name of the state was adopted as a surname.

variants.name: Soo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Kwang, Suk, Chan, Chia, Chin, Chyi, Han, Keng, Kwan, Kyung, Leong, Liang.
Chinese: variant of   Su  .

variants.name: Soe
meanings: Burmese: from a personal name usually forming part of a compound name, from soe ‘to dominate’. — Note: Since Burmese do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 蘇, possibly based on its Cantonese or Teochew or Hokkien pronunciation, see   Su   1.

variants.name: Sou
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 蘇, possibly based on its Cantonese or Teochew or Hokkien pronunciation, see   Su   1.

variants.name: So
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jin, Sang, Young, Jung, Yong, Song, Wai, Ying, Chun, Jae, Sun, Tong.  Korean Chong, Chang, Byung, Myong, Chong Hun, Kum, Yiu, Cho, Chong Ha, Chong Kil, Chong Sok, Chong Soon.

Korean (Sŏ): although there are two Chinese characters for the Sŏ surname, one of these is very rare and can be discounted (there are only about two hundred people in Korea who use this rare character). Some records indicate that the more common character for Sŏ has as many as 165 clans, but only eleven of them can be documented. The first recorded ancestor of the Sŏ clans seems to be a Shilla figure named Sŏ Shin-il. According to some legends, the rulers of the Old Chosŏn kingdom (died 194 BC ) were driven from power by the Wiman Chosŏn and settled in the Ich’ŏn area. The Sŏ clans are among the descendants of these ancient rulers. About fifty percent of modern members of the Sŏ clans live in the Kyŏngsang provinces or in Chŏlla South province.
Chinese: Cantonese or Teochew/Hokkien form of the surname 蘇, see   Su   1. It is also found in Southeast Asian countries, such as Malaysia, Philippines and Indonesia. Compare   Soh   1.

variants.name: Soh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Won, Jin, Cheng, Eng, Hongjun, Hyun, Jae, Jung, Kwang, Man, Mun, Myung.  Korean Byung, Byung Joon, Eui Young, Jin Young, Siew.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 蘇, see   Su   1, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. It is common in Malaysia and Singapore. Compare   So   3.
Korean: variant of Sŏ (see So 1).

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.
German: variant of   Ferch  .

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn was born in 1451, her father, Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court, was 26 and her mother, Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn, was 52. She married Sir Rys ap Thomas about 1469, in Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 November 1545, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn est née en 1451, son père, Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Rys ap Thomas environ 1469, à Castle Green Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1545, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilynが1451年に生まれた時，父Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Courtは26歳，母Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybrynは52歳であった。約1469年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアカストル グレン カーマースンでSir Rys ap Thomasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1545年11月9日にイギリスウェールズで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn(이)가 1451년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 대략 1469년 웨일스 카마테실르 카스틀 그린 카마테에서 Sir Rys ap Thomas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1545년 11월 9일 영국 웨일스에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva Verch Henry sw Gwilyn родилась в 1451 г., её отцу по имени Sir Henry Ap Gwilym apGwilym Knight de Court было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabli ferch Gwilym of Ystradffin Llanfairarybryn, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Rys ap Thomas около 1469 г. в местности кастл грин кармартен, кармартеншир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 ноября 1545 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 94 лет.
